subject_need: Reduce command-discovery cost across the AOF CLI surface
alternative_solutions: Introduce a command taxonomy and registry as a new canonical metadata layer.
Add a much shorter task-oriented quickstart without canonical registry metadata.
Generate command-selection views dynamically from CLI metadata while keeping the long reference as the source of truth.
non_solution_options: Keep relying on the full CLI reference and operator memory only.
Assume AI can always infer command roles from names without canonical routing help.
defer_options: Defer until after a larger runtime authority expansion, at the cost of growing context debt.
stop_options: Do not create a new layer if taxonomy cannot be kept canonical and low-drift.
